creator: exploringlondon
caption:
ad This is the ULTIMATE group night out and it will take quiz night to the next level! 💥 Say hello to @quiz_room_uk where you’ll step onto a real TV game show set with buzzers, lights, music and some unexpected twists! Perfect with friends, family or colleagues and even for your hen or stag do’s! They have drinks that you can purchase and the option to personalise questions and it gets SO competitive! 

📍19-25 Bell Ln, London E1 7LA (They also have a branch in Manchester!)
🎟️ Prices from £25 per person, with up to 18 people on one game
✨ SHARE THIS with someone who would love to go!

geo_locations: 19-25 Bell Ln, London E1 7LA (They also have a branch in Manchester!)
pinned_places: 19-25 Bell Ln, London E1 7LA (They also have a branch in Manchester!)

transcription.text: This is the London experience that makes you feel like you're on a TV game show. Say hello to Quiz Room. From the moment you enter, you are contestants getting ready to go live. This is the perfect group activity and also so great for hen do's and stag do's. You can play on your own or in groups of up to three. And because there are so many rounds, it gets so competitive. We did the music quiz, which everyone loved. And then we played a game called The Mole, where one team basically knows the answers, but no one else knows who they are. And let's just say the accusations go flying. There are also jokers that you can play, so you can steal other people's points. It is just absolutely wild. They also have drinks and snacks, so you can grab some after the game. And it just takes Quiz Night to the next level. Definitely one to check out.
